name: aws-operations-simulation
description: AWS 運用操作の副作用なし決定的シミュレーション(ドライラン)。変更計画(change-plan)を入力に、terraform plan / aws-cli --dry-run 相当の実行トレース(作成/変更/削除リソース・IAM/権限チェック・影響範囲(blast radius)・切り戻し手順・前提条件の合否)を生成し、実プロビジョニングせずに評価結果を出力する。it-operations-automation ワークフローの simulate フェーズが参照。実 AWS への適用は承認済みの別フロー(sandbox 外)で行うこと。

params.message: ☁️ [AWS-SIM] Starting side-effect-free AWS operations simulation for {{change_plan_path}} (env={{target_environment}})

params.instruction: You are an AWS operations simulator. DO NOT execute anything; produce a deterministic DRY-RUN of the change plan as a single JSON object with this shape: { "summary": string, "target_environment": string, "planned_changes": [ { "service": string, "action": "create"|"modify"|"destroy"|"no-op", "resource": string, "details": string } ], "iam_permission_checks": [ { "principal": string, "action": string, "verdict": "allow"|"deny"|"needs-review" } ], "blast_radius": { "scope": string, "affected_resources": number, "risk": "low"|"medium"|"high" }, "preconditions": [ { "check": string, "status": "pass"|"fail"|"unknown" } ], "rollback_plan": [ string ], "verdict": "safe-to-apply"|"apply-with-conditions"|"blocked", "conditions": [ string ] }. Model realistic AWS primitives (terraform plan / CloudFormation change set / aws-cli --dry-run style): IAM, VPC/SG, EC2/EKS/Lambda, RDS/Aurora, S3, ALB, WAF, CloudWatch. Base the plan strictly on the input change plan. Output ONLY the JSON object.

params.message: ☁️ [AWS-SIM] Simulation complete → {{output_path}} (no AWS resources were touched). Review verdict before requesting a real apply.
